notes: South Africa are without creative playmaker Themba Zwane (suspended after a red card vs Mexico) but are boosted by Teboho Mokoena's return from his one-game ban; Hugo Broos is expected to make just one change from the side that beat South Korea. Canada are severely depleted in midfield — Ismaël Koné is out for the tournament (broken tibia/fibula), Stephen Eustaquio is listed as doubtful/injured after sitting out the first half vs Switzerland with a leg issue, Alfie Jones remains out (thigh)…
home_scorers: Evidence Makgopa (leading striker, expected to start as focal point of attack)
Oswin Appollis (pace threat on the wing, direct runner in transition)
Relebohile Mofokeng (creative attacker, set-piece and counter-attack threat)
away_scorers: Jonathan David (leading striker, hat-trick vs Qatar, three tournament goals)
Cyle Larin (co-striker, expected to start alongside David)
Tajon Buchanan (wide attacker, direct dribbler, set-piece threat)
